narrative:
Precinct Moxahala (precinct in Muskingum County) has 842 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
